name: Pumpkin Pudding Pie with Coriander Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package (15 oz) Pillsbury All Purpose Pie Crust, Refrigerated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare pie crust according to package directions and place in a 9-inch pie pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat brown sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
4. Add pumpkin and eggs; blend well.
5. Stir in the pancake mix (1 tsp coriander, 1/2 tsp cinnamon, and 1/8 tsp cloves).
6. Pour mixture into prepared pie crust.
7. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until set when lightly touched in the center.
8. For sauce: In a small saucepan, combine sugar, butter, whipping cream, ground coriander, vanilla, and heat until boiling.
9. Reduce heat and simmer over low heat for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
10. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
11. Serve sauce over warm or room temperature pie wedges.
12. Pass additional sauce on the side.
Store leftovers in the refrigerator. Serves 8 to 10.
